event: Still Life with Bottles and Fruit
description: A tabletop still life arrangement against a dark reddish-brown backdrop. At center, a dark bottle with a label and a decorative blue ceramic decanter with a glass stopper stand behind several oranges and lemons. A purple-tinted wine glass sits at the left. Peeled orange segments and lemon halves are scattered in the foreground. The fruits are rendered with rich, saturated colors and visible brushwork.
